title: senna subtrijuga
intro: Senna subtrijuga, a plant species belonging to the Legume family, is a shrub-like herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Senna subtrijuga include its laxative and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sennosides, a group of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat constipation, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Senna subtrijuga can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and dried leaves, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
